name: Respond.io
description: Respond.io — Omnichannel messaging CRM for managing customer conversations across WhatsApp, Messenger, and more.

seo.title: Respond.io — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Respond.io: Respond.io — Omnichannel messaging CRM for managing customer conversations across WhatsApp, Messenger, and more.

when_to_use: Omnichannel CRM for customer conversations across apps
Automated chatbot routing before human agent handoff
Sales pipeline management via conversational channels
Team inbox with SLA tracking for messaging support

pros: Omnichannel inbox across WhatsApp, Messenger, IG, TikTok
Automation builder powerful without being code-only
Strong reporting and agent management features
Clear pricing with generous channel flexibility
cons: Not a raw CPaaS — you still need BSP/Meta approvals
Learning curve on advanced automations and AI
Pricing climbs with contacts and AI usage
Some platform changes ship with minimal notice
review.verdict: One of the stronger omnichannel conversation CRMs — great for sales teams, assuming you want a product, not an API.
review.best_for: Sales and support teams juggling WhatsApp, Messenger and IG in one inbox
review.not_for: Dev teams wanting a raw CPaaS API rather than a conversation CRM
